mapper.select: select * from ygt_wecom_group where ygt_wg_status = 1 and ygt_wg_corp_id = #{corpId} order by ygt_wecom_group_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_wecom_group ( ygt_wg_corp_id, ygt_wg_chat_id, ygt_wg_chat_name, ygt_wg_owner_user_id, ygt_wg_member_count, ygt_wg_status, ygt_wg_nx_community_id, ygt_wg_leader_user_id, ygt_wg_admin_user_id, ygt_wg_source, ygt_wg_create_time, ygt_wg_update_time ) values ( #{ygtWgCorpId}, #{ygtWgChatId}, #{ygtWgChatName}, #{ygtWgOwnerUserId}, #{ygtWgMemberCount}, #{ygtWgStatus}, #{ygtWgNxCommunityId}, #{ygtWgLeaderUserId}, #{ygtWgAdminUserId}, #{ygtWgSource}, #{ygtWgCreateTime}, #{ygtWgUpdateTime} )
mapper.update: update ygt_wecom_group set ygt_wg_status = #{status}, ygt_wg_update_time = now() where ygt_wecom_group_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_wecom_group where ygt_wecom_group_id in #{id}
